text: Aaj rishta wale dekhne aaye the aur jab unhe mere PCOD ke baare mein pata chala toh unhone yeh keh kar mana kar diya ki aage chal kar sasural mein 'bacche' ki problem hogi. Jaise hi unhone darwaza band kiya, mere sir mein itna bhayankar dard utha ki meri aakhon ke aage andhera chha gaya. Ab mujhe lagatar ulti jaisa mehsus ho raha hai aur pet mein itni aithan hai ki main bistar se uth kar apni kitabein bhi nahi utha pa rahi.

Ladke walon ne mera rishta yeh bol kar thukra diya ki main bohot thaki-thaki lagti hoon aur shaadi ke baad unke khandaan ko waaris dene ke kabil nahi lagti. Yeh baatein sunne ke baad se meri chhaati itni bhari lag rahi hai jaise kisi ne pathar rakh diya ho. Saans lene mein itni takleef aur badan mein aisi thakan ho rahi hai ki lagta hai kal main college ki classes ke liye apne pairo par khadi bhi nahi ho paungi.

Rishte ki baat chal hi rahi thi ki ladke ki mummy ne kundali dekh kar bola ki iske 'santan sukh' mein dosh hai aur humein aisi bahu nahi chahiye. Unke achanak jaane ke baad se mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb sa dard phail gaya hai, jaise kisi ne meri haddiyan tod di hon. Mujhe andar hi andar itna bukhar mehsus ho raha hai ki meri padhai par dhyan dena toh door, theek se aankh kholna bhi namumkin lag raha hai.

Kal raat wale rishte ko isliye mana kiya gaya kyunki unhe meri pichli medical report ka pata chal gaya tha aur unhe dar tha ki mujhe sasural mein maa banne mein dikkat hogi. Papa gusse mein bol rahe hain ki 'log kya kahenge', aur unki awaaz sunkar mere dimaag ki nas fatne ko ho rahi hai. Mere haath-pair bilkul sunn pad gaye hain aur aise chakkar aa rahe hain jaise main abhi behosh hokar gir jaungi.

Aaj ladke walo ne yeh keh kar mana kar diya ki ladki college ki padhai ke stress mein abhi se aadhi bimaar lagti hai, aisi kamzor ladki khandaan aage kaise badhayegi. Unke jaane ke baad se mera gala itna sookh gaya hai ki paani ka ghoont bhi gale se neeche nahi utar raha. Dil itni zor se dhadak raha hai ki lagta hai bahar aa jayega aur meri peeth mein ek aisi jalan shuru ho gayi hai jo rukne ka naam nahi le rahi.
